title: Astra Demo
description: A minimal Astra landing example with i18n + island + VRT baseline.
headSnippets: <meta property="og:description" content="A minimal Astra landing example with i18n + island + VRT baseline.">

<style>:root{color-scheme:light dark}html[data-theme="dark"]{background:#0b1020;color:#e5e7eb}html[data-theme="light"]{background:#ffffff;color:#111827}.hero{padding:64px 24px;text-align:center}.hero h1{font-size:48px;margin:0 0 16px;letter-spacing:-0.02em}.hero p{font-size:18px;margin:0 0 24px;opacity:0.8}.cta{display:inline-flex;gap:12px;justify-content:center;margin-top:8px}.cta a{display:inline-block;padding:10px 20px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid currentColor;text-decoration:none;font-weight:600}.cta a.primary{background:#4f46e5;color:#fff;border-color:#4f46e5}.features{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr));gap:16px;max-width:960px;margin:32px auto;padding:0 24px}.features .card{padding:20px;border:1px solid rgba(120,120,120,0.3);border-radius:12px}.features .card h3{margin:0 0 8px;font-size:18px}.features .card p{margin:0;opacity:0.75;font-size:14px}.lang-switch{position:absolute;top:16px;right:24px;font-size:14px}footer{padding:32px 24px;text-align:center;opacity:0.7;font-size:14px;border-top:1px solid rgba(120,120,120,0.2);margin-top:48px}@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce){*{animation-duration:0.001s!important;transition-duration:0.001s!important}}</style>
